stories.title: US1532131: V2601.01 - default value and description updates: Medicare ASC Medicare DRG Medicare ESRD Medicare FQHC Medicare HHA Medicare Hospice Medicare IPF Medicare IRF TRICARE/CHAMPUS
stories.description:
All changes highlighted in yellow in the attached spreadsheets. 
Existing records should be updated to include the new fields, and the values for these new fields should be set to the default values provided.

Medicare DRG

stories.title: US1591186: V2605.00 - New Mexico Medicaid APC Start Date Update
stories.story_summary_title: New Mexico Medicaid APC Description and Start Date Update
stories.description:
As a user it would be helpful to have an updated Start Data for the "Adjustment Factor" field.
Change is highlighted in yellow in the attached spreadsheet. Existing records should not be updated to include the changes, and the values for that field should be set to the default values provided.
Filler will not need to be updated.
